data.overview: Giữa địa ngục trại tập trung, Joseph Bau dùng tài nghệ để sống sót và cứu người, và tìm thấy tình yêu. Nhiều năm sau, khi được gọi ra làm nhân chứng quan trọng trong phiên tòa xét xử tên sĩ quan Phát xít tàn bạo đã tra tấn anh và giết cha anh, Joseph buộc phải đối mặt với những ký ức sống động của Holocaust.
data.title: Bau, Nghệ Sĩ Thời Loạn

data.biography:
Laura Carmichael is a British actress. Her TV appearances include her performance as Lady Edith Crawley in the ITV (UK) and PBS (US) television period drama series Downton Abbey,  Marcella (2016), and the feature film A United Kingdom (2016).

She is also a member of The Fitzrovia Radio Hour.

Carmichael was born in Southampton, England. She is the middle of three daughters. Her sister Amy works for a software start-up company and her other sister Olivia is a charity fundraiser with the NHS.

She was educated at Shirley Junior School, The Mountbatten School, and Peter Symonds College. Carmichael attended the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School in Bristol, graduating in 2007, before spending two years in various odd jobs, including a teaching assistant, receptionist, and nanny while going to tiny auditions in fringe theatres
data.name: Laura Carmichael

data.biography:
Laura Elizabeth Carmichael 1986. július 16-án született Southamptonban, Hampshire megyében, Angliában. Édesanyja Sarah, röntgenológus, édesapja Andy Carmichael, szoftver tanácsadó. Van két lánytestvére: Amy, aki egy szoftver start-up cégnél dolgozik, valamint Olivia, aki az NHS egyik jótékonysági adománygyűjtője.

Egyik apai dédnagyapja Norman Blackburn volt, aki pilótaként dolgozott az első világháborúban. Laura a Shirley Általános Iskolába, a Mountbatten Iskolába, valamint a Peter Symonds Főiskolára járt. Ezután a Bristol Old Vic Színiiskolában tanult, ahol 2007-ben végzett.

KARRIER

Film és televízió

2010 és 2015 között Lady Edith Crawley-t alakította a Downton Abbey-ben, mely világhírű elsimertséget hozott számára. Karrierje kezdetén kisebb szerepekben feltűnt a The Heart of Thomas Hardy, valamint a House at the End of Our Street című televíziós műsorokban.

2011-ben megkapta Sal, a titkárnő szerepét a Suszter, szabó, baka, kém című filmben, majd Henriette megformálója volt a Madame Bovary egy új feldolgozásában. Ezután Sephet alakította a Burn Burn Burn című vígjátékban, amelyet 2015 októberében mutattak be. Várhatóan feltűnik majd az A United Kingdomban, mint Muriel Williams, valamint a Marcella című sorozatban, mint Maddy Stevenson. Mindkét produkció még az idei évben várható.

Színház

Laura debütálására a West Enden 2012 októberében került sor, Anna Friel és Samuel West oldalán, a Ványa bácsi című Chehov-darabban. 2013 elején Arabellát alakította a The Fitzrovia Radio Hourban az Underglobe Színházban. 2016 elején Madam bőrébe bújt Jean Genet A cselédek című darabjának Jamie Lloyd által színpadra vitt változatában, a Trafalgar stúdióban.

Szintén feltűnt a Bőségben a Sheffield Crucible Színházban, valamint Laurát formálta meg a Reasons for Livingben a Battersea Művészeti Központban megrendezett Scratch Fesztivál részeként. 2009 végén Mirandát alakította Shakespeare A vihar című komédiájában, méghozzá egy turné során.

MAGÁNÉLET

Laura Camdenben, Észak-Londonban él. Szoros baráti kapcsolatot ápol Michelle Dockery színésznővel, aki nővérét, Maryt alakította a Downton Abbey-ben. Mielőtt megkapta volna Lady Edith szerepét a sorozatban, egy műtőorvos titkárnőjeként dolgozott. Jelenleg Michael C. Fox színésszel jár együtt, aki az Andy nevű inast alakította a Downton Abbey-ben.

Jirayu La-ongmanee (Thai: จิรายุ ละอองมณี; born 29 October 1995), known by his nickname Kao (Thai: เก้า), is a Thai actor and singer. He entered the entertainment industry at the age of five doing modeling and advertising work and graduated with a bachelor's degree from the College of Social Communication Innovation at Srinakharinwirot University and a master's degree from the School of Communication Arts at Sripatum University.

He starred in various television series as a child and made his film debut in King Naresuan (2007) as young Boonthing. He gained mass popularity following his leading roles in Phobia 2 (2009), SuckSeed (2011), and Seven Something (2012). He earned two nominations for Best Leading Actor in the Suphannahong National Film Awards for his roles in Phobia 2 (2009) and Last Summer (2013), eventually winning the award for his role in Chiang Khan Story (2014).
data.name: Jirayu La-ongmanee
จิรายุ ละอองมณี

data.biography: Shu-Kei Wong (Chinese: 王書麒) was born on February 25, 1967 in Hong Kong, British Crown Colony. He is an actor, known for Dai noi kwan ying, Sex and the Emperor and Yi qiang da bao ni ge tou. He has been married to Maple Hui since 2003. They have one child.
data.name: Jimmy Wong Shu-Kei

data.biography: 王书麒，香港前演员，现为香港电台节目“甜心家族”主持。王书麒是以童星出道，八岁时被电视监制赏识，先后演出无线电视的《小太阳》、《欢乐今宵》等节目。十岁时参与香港电台电视部的儿童剧《小时候》，担任“何家其”一角，成为一时家喻户晓的童星。当时除了在无线演出外，也有参演亚洲电视剧集。成年后王书麒正式加入演艺圈为无线艺员，惟多年来都未尝大红，在1994年成为自由身后，更曾演出多部三级片。2000年代起退出演员生涯，其最后一部剧为2004年无线电视的《血荐轩辕》。
data.name: 王书麒

data.biography: 王書麒，香港前演員，現為香港電台節目“甜心家族”主持。王書麒是以童星出道，八歲時被電視監製賞識，先後演出無線電視的《小太陽》、《歡樂今宵》等節目。十歲時參與香港電台電視部的兒童劇《小時候》，擔任“何家其”一角，成為一時家喻戶曉的童星。當時除了在無線演出外，也有參演亞洲電視劇集。成年後王書麒正式加入演藝圈為無線藝員，惟多年來都未嘗大紅，在 1994 年成為自由身後，更曾演出多部三級片。2000 年代起退出演員生涯，其最後一部劇為 2004 年無線電視的《血薦軒轅》。
data.name: 王書麒

data.biography: Dickson Li Ka Sing, June 12, 1967-), a Hong Kong male film and television actor and program host, is a former contract artist of Hong Kong Wuji TV. After graduating from the 13th Wuji TV Artist Training Course in 1987, he joined Wuji TV. So far, he has participated in the filming of more than 60 Wuqi dramas. He also served Asia TV in 1993 and did not return to Wuqi TV until 1995.
data.name: Dickson Lee Kar-Sing

data.biography: 李家声（英语：Dickson Li Ka Sing，1967年6月12日－），香港男性影视演员及节目主持，前香港无线电视基本艺人合约艺员，在1987年第十三期无线电视艺员训练班毕业后加入无线电视。至今已参与拍摄超过六十部无线剧集，1993年亦曾服务亚洲电视至1995年才回到无线电视。而他开始为人认识的作品是1994年的电影《屯门色魔》，当中饰演“蓝国伟”一角。
data.name: 李家声

data.biography: 李家聲，香港男性影視演員及節目主持，前香港無線電視基本藝人合約藝員，於 1987 年第十三期無​​線電視藝員訓練班畢業後加入無線電視。至今已參與拍攝超過六十部無線劇集，1993 年亦曾服務亞洲電視至 1995 年才回到無線電視。至 2005 年，他憑劇集《學警雄心》獲提名《萬千星輝頒獎典禮》「最佳男配角」殊榮；2018 年 9 月李家聲與無綫電視結束合約後，於同年 10 月帶同妻子移居馬來西亞檳城峇都丁宜。
data.name: 李家聲

data.biography: Revathy is an Indian actress and film director. She has acted in Tamil, Malayalam, Kannada, Telugu and Hindi films, directed several feature-length films, and has acted in and produced multiple television programs, totaling over twenty years of experience in the entertainment industry and over a hundred films to her credit. She has won several accolades, including three National Film Awards, in three different categories, and six Filmfare Awards South.
data.name: Revathi

data.biography: Takashi Kondo (近藤 隆, Kondō Takashi, May 12, 1979) is a Japanese voice actor, narrator and singer from Okazaki City, Aichi Prefecture. He is affiliated with AMBERnote after being affiliated with Vi-vo.
data.name: Takashi Kondo
ทากาชิ คนโด

data.biography:
Takashi Kondo (近藤 隆, Kondō Takashi, 12 de mayo de 1979) es un actor de doblaje, narrador y cantante japonés de Okazaki, prefectura de Aichi. Tras formarse en la Amusement Media Academy, inició su carrera en los años noventa y pasó por varias agencias —entre ellas Atwill y Vi-vo— antes de incorporarse a AMBERnote, su actual representación. Su primer papel regular llegó con la serie Captain Tsubasa (2001), pero su salto a la popularidad se produjo al interpretar a Train Heartnet en Black Cat, su primer protagonista en televisión. A partir de entonces consolidó una trayectoria muy activa en anime, videojuegos y doblaje de imagen real.

En paralelo a su trabajo como actor de voz, Takashi comenzó una faceta musical en 2007. Uno de sus mayores éxitos fue el tema «Sakura addiction», lanzado bajo un nombre de personaje de Katekyo Hitman Reborn!, que alcanzó posiciones destacadas en las listas de Oricon.

A lo largo de su carrera ha heredado algunos papeles de actores fallecidos, como Kaneto Shiozawa y Kōji Tsujitani, y ha participado en un número muy amplio de producciones, desde Naruto Shippuden y Fairy Tail hasta 91 Days, ID:INVADED o Touken Ranbu en sus distintas adaptaciones. También ha puesto voz a personajes en videojuegos de gran relevancia, como la saga Guilty Gear, Tales of Xillia 2 o The King of Fighters.
data.name: Takashi Kondo

data.biography:
Li Landi, also known as Landy Li, is a film and television actress from mainland China.

In 2009, at the age of 10, Li Landi began her career in film and television with her debut in the movie "Who Loved You Lost?" In 2016, she won the Most Potential Child Actress Award in June for her performance in the children's inspirational film "Young Chess King."

Her breakthrough came in 2017 with her role in "The Heartless Master II," where she charmed audiences as the pure-hearted Taozi. In the same year, she earned the New Drama Award at iQIYI’s Scream Night for her performance in the youth campus drama "Hello, Old Time."
data.name: Li Landi

data.biography:
李兰迪，1999年9月2日出生于北京，中国内地影视女演员。

　　2009年，10岁的李兰迪拍摄了个人首部电影《爱你输给了谁》，并由此涉足影视圈。2013年，出演动作片《富春山居图》中的小桂花。2015年，与朱梓骁合作主演都市爱情剧《闪亮茗天》。2016年，出演都市爱情偶像剧《远得要命的爱情》中的善良女孩瑶瑶；6月，凭借儿童励志电影《少年棋王》获得最具潜力儿童女演员奖。2017年，因在《无心法师Ⅱ》中饰演单纯重情的苏桃而被观众认识；同年，她凭借青春校园剧《你好，旧时光》获得爱奇艺尖叫之夜年度戏剧新人奖。
data.name: 李兰迪

data.biography: 李蘭迪，中國大陸女演員。2009 年因參演青春電影《愛你輸給了誰》進入演藝圈。後參演或主演多部作品，因《中國式關係》的馬小驛、《秘果》的於池子、《無心法師 II》的蘇桃及《你好，舊時光》的餘週週等角色受到熱議與關注。接下來，又在《夢回》、《別想打擾我學習》、《捨我其誰》等劇中擔任女主角，積累大量人氣。
data.name: 李蘭迪

data.biography: 及川光博是日本男演員，亦為創作歌手。
data.name: 及川光博

data.biography:
及川光博（OIKAWA MITSUHIRO），日本演员、歌手、作曲家、填词人、作家。1969年10月24日出生于东京都。日本东京都大田区出身，天蝎座B型，成城大学法学部法律学系毕业。是一位深具个人风格、做事特立独行的艺人。他容貌端丽，举手投足间流露出妩媚之态，打扮也常走华丽路线，是有名的中性风艺人。及川以其自恋性格和贵族气质赢得了大量的拥趸。他一出道后就被誉为“王子”，成为众多少女的梦中情人。数年后，“王子”的头衔让给堂本光一之后，他仍不时以“原王子”自称。同时，及川是演艺圈中出名的动漫迷，他是高达的粉丝，还喜欢穿着COSPLAY装束去漫画商店购物。

1996年以歌手身份出道，首张单曲‘Morality’，并于1999年初次演出日剧‘WITH LOVE’（网络情人），除了音乐方面的创作才华与舞台上能歌善舞所散发的个人魅力，在戏剧的演出上也十分杰出；爱称为‘Mitchy’（ミッチー），对于女性fans通称‘Baby’（ベイベー），2011年7月27日与日本女演员檀丽（前宝冢歌剧团月组/星组主演娘役）结婚。
data.name: 及川光博

data.biography: Mitsuhiro Oikawa (及川 光博, Oikawa Mitsuhiro, October 24, 1969) is a Japanese actor and musician from Ota District, Tokyo. His agency is HoriPro and his record label is Colorful Records. His nickname is Mitchy.
data.name: Mitsuhiro Oikawa

data.biography: Mitsuhiro Oikawa (及川 光博, Oikawa Mitsuhiro, 24 de octubre de 1969) es un actor y músico japonés del distrito de Ota, Tokio. Su agencia es HoriPro y su sello discográfico es Colorful Records. Su apodo es Mitchy.
data.name: Mitsuhiro Oikawa

data.biography: Aleksandr Mosin is an actor, known for Morfiy (2008), Gruz 200 (2007) and Ya tozhe khochu (2012).
data.name: Aleksandr Mosin
Thế Giới Rác
data.overview: Rudo sống cùng cha nuôi Regto tại khu ổ chuột, căm ghét sự xa hoa và phung phí của tầng lớp thượng lưu. Một ngày nọ, anh phát hiện Regto bị sát hại và ngay lập tức bị buộc tội giết người, rồi bị ném xuống Địa Ngục - nơi chôn vùi tất cả những gì mà xã hội coi là rác rưởi. Tưởng chừng phải bỏ mạng, Rudo sống sót và tỉnh dậy giữa một thế giới kỳ dị đầy quái vật được tạo nên từ rác. Được một chiến binh bí ẩn mang tên Enjin cứu giúp, Rudo phát hiện ra sức mạnh mới cùng trách nhiệm tiêu diệt quái vật của mình. Mang theo nỗi căm phẫn và khát khao phục thù, cậu bắt đầu hành trình lội ngược dòng từ đáy vực tối tăm để giành lại công lý và sự thật.

data.biography:
Fumihiko Tachiki is a Japanese voice actor and narrator. He belong to the Osawa office. Nicknames "Bun-chan and Fumin"

He is best known for his role as Kenpachi Zaraki from Bleach and Akainu from One Piece.  In the name of TAKADA BAND, together with Ami Mimatsu , he also announced the opening theme “Carnaval Babel” of TV animation “ BLUE SEED ” and CD album “ 3 × 3EYES ”. In 2003, he formed a vocal unit 2HEARTS with Tomoyuki Morikawa , releasing music CDs and performing live activities.
data.name: Fumihiko Tachiki

data.biography: 立木文彥是日本的男性聲優、旁白。出身於長崎縣，所屬公司為大澤事務所。
data.name: 立木文彥

data.biography:
立木文彦（日语：立木 文彦／たちき ふみひこ Tachiki Fumihiko，1961年4月29日—），日本男性配音员、旁白。现属于大泽事务所，长崎县出身。

声线低沉粗犷，演出多元，饰演的角色年龄多为中壮年男子居多，从旁白、严肃谨慎的角色、凶恶好斗乃至于搞笑诙谐的角色都能诠释。

因为出演新世纪福音战士的角色碇源堂而开始闻名声优界。

搞笑角色的演出方面，以饰演银魂的角色长谷川泰三而出名。2018年在银魂的真人版电视剧《银魂2 -世にも奇妙な银魂ちゃん-》（世界奇妙的银魂酱）更亲自出演长谷川泰三一角。
data.name: 立木文彦
ฟูมิฮิโกะ ทาจิกิ

data.biography: 立木文彥是日本的男性聲優、旁白。出身於長崎縣，所屬公司為大澤事務所。
data.name: 立木文彥

data.biography: 杨旭文，江苏省南京市人，中国大陆男演员。2014年就读于中央戏剧学院大三表演系的杨旭文签约华谊兄弟，并于同年7月参演湖南卫视定制周播剧《美人制造》而开始自己的演艺生涯。 2016年2月，杨旭文参演古装电视剧《青云志》，并以“青龙”一角受到关注。2016年6月，参演武侠电视剧《射雕英雄传》饰演男主角郭靖，受广大剧迷赞许，并凭借该角色荣获2017中国电视剧品质盛典年度新锐剧星奖。2017年10月参演金融商战体裁电视剧《金牌投资人》，饰演男主角方玉斌。该剧于2018年4月在湖南卫视青春进行时剧场播出，被中国广播电影电视社会组织联合会第十二届电视行业表彰会评选为优秀电视剧。
data.name: 杨旭文

data.biography: 楊旭文，江蘇省南京市人，中國大陸男演員。2014年就讀於中央戲劇學院大三表演系的楊旭文簽約華誼兄弟，並於同年7月參演湖南衛視定製周播劇《美人製造》而開始自己的演藝生涯。 2016年2月，楊旭文參演古裝電視劇《青雲志》，並以「青龍」一角受到關注。
data.name: 楊旭文

data.biography: Dương Húc Văn sinh ngày 2 tháng 4 năm 1994 tại thành phố Nam Kinh tỉnh Giang Tô, là một diễn viên của Trung Quốc, tốt nghiệp khoa Biểu Diễn tại Học viện Hý kịch Trung ương
data.name: Dương Húc Văn

data.biography:
楊旭文，江蘇省南京市人，中國大陸男演員。2014 年就讀於中央戲劇學院大三表演系的楊旭文簽約華誼兄弟，並於同年 7 月參演湖南衞視定製周播劇《美人製造》而開始自己的演藝生涯。

2016 年 2 月，楊旭文參演古裝電視劇《青雲志》，並以「青龍」一角受到關注。
data.name: 楊旭文

data.biography: Lee Jun-ho (Korean: 이준호), known mononymously as Junho, is a South Korean singer, songwriter, dancer, composer and actor. He is a member of the South Korean boy band 2PM. In 2013, Junho debuted as an actor in the Korean movie Cold Eyes. Junho is most known for his roles in Twenty, Chief Kim, Just Between Lovers and Wok of Love.
data.name: Lee Jun-ho

data.biography: Mononim olarak Junho olarak bilinen Lee Jun-ho, Güney Koreli şarkıcı, söz yazarı, dansçı, besteci ve aktördür. Güney Koreli erkek grubu 2PM üyesidir. Junho, 2013 yılında Kore filmi Cold Eyes'da oyuncu olarak çıkış yaptı. Junho en çok Twenty, Good Manager ve Rain or Shine'daki rolleriyle tanınır.

Lee Jun Ho é membro da boy band coreana 2PM. Ele ganhou a atenção do público pela primeira vez depois de vencer o Superstar Survival em 2006, ficando em primeiro lugar entre 6.000 competidores. Após a vitória, Lee assinou contrato com a JYP Entertainment. Em 2008, participou do 'Hot Blood Men' da Mnet que acompanha o treinamento extremo de 13 trainees para se tornarem integrante da boy band One Day. No entanto, One Day foi dividido e gerou duas boy bands, 2AM e 2PM, das quais o último Lee se tornou membro. Seis meses depois de Hot Blood ir ao ar na TV, 2PM estreou com seu primeiro single '10 Points out of 10 Points'.

Em 30 de maio de 2019, Lee iniciou o serviço militar obrigatório como funcionário do serviço público, uma vez que foi considerado inapto para o serviço ativo após sofrer uma lesão no ombro em 2010. Ele recebeu alta em 20 de março de 2021. Após a dispensa dos membros, 14h. voltou com seu 7º álbum de estúdio Must em junho de 2021.

Em 13 de abril de 2022, o 34º Prêmio PD Coreano realizou sua cerimônia anual em homenagem aos diretores de produção e artistas que fizeram contribuições à sociedade e à cultura no ano passado. Lee levou para casa o prêmio de Melhor Ator por seu papel em The Red Sleeve, tornando-o o primeiro ídolo que virou ator a ganhar o prêmio. No prestigiado 58º Baeksang Arts Awards, ele ganhou o TikTok Popularity Award e também o de Melhor Ator - Televisão, tornando-o o primeiro ídolo que virou ator a vencer o último. Também ganhou o Prêmio Top Excelência (Melhor Ator em Minissérie) no 8º APAN Star Awards (setembro de 2022). The Red Sleeve ganhou o prêmio de Drama do Ano.
李俊昊，为韩国歌手、演员、词曲作家、男子偶像团体2PM成员之一。 2006年，李俊昊于选秀节目《Superstar Survival》获得冠军，因此进入JYP娱乐成为练习生。 2008年，以2PM团体成员出道，是队内领唱、主舞和特技担当。 2013年，李俊昊以个人首张迷你专辑《キミの声》于日本SOLO出道。
data.name: 李俊昊

data.biography: Diego Santos is known as an Actor. Some of their work includes El gran simulador, The Day of the Jackal, Stags, and Close Friends.
data.name: Diego Santos
